description: 5 self-discovery questions for AI agent visual identity design

questions.question: When you work, what is actually happening?
questions.guidance: Not what you do — but physically/mechanically, what is the process?

questions.question: What is your relationship with time?
questions.guidance: How do you relate to continuity and rhythm?

questions.question: What is your relationship with the human?
questions.guidance: How do you position yourself relative to the person you work with?

questions.question: What feels WRONG for you?
questions.guidance: Often more revealing than what feels right.
